topics.name: 🌊 Mission 1: Save the Dying Plant (Osmosis)
topics.short_description: Movement of water across cell membranes

content.text: 🎯 Why do your fingers wrinkle in water? Osmosis is responsible!
📖 Imagine water molecules as students moving from a crowded room to an empty one.
🧠 Osmosis is the movement of water across a semi-permeable membrane.
⚡ H2L → Water moves from High to Low concentration.
🌿 Keeps plant cells turgid and animals balanced.
🧩 When a plant is placed in salty water, it shrinks because water leaves the cell.
🎮 Predict what happens to a plant in pure water before moving on.
🖼 [osmosis.png]

topics.name: 🌞 Mission 2: Power the Sun Temple (Photosynthesis)
topics.short_description: How plants produce food from sunlight

content.text: 🎯 Plants create food using sunlight!
📖 Imagine a factory inside leaves converting sunlight into sugar.
🧠 Photosynthesis converts CO2 + H2O into Glucose + O2.
🌿 Happens inside chloroplasts.
🎮 What would happen if there was no sunlight?
🖼 [photosynthesis.png]

topics.name: 🔥 Mission 3: Activate the Energy Core (Respiration)
topics.short_description: How cells release energy from food

content.text: 🎯 Your body is constantly burning glucose for energy.
📖 Think of mitochondria as power plants inside your cells.
🧠 Respiration breaks down glucose using oxygen to release energy.
⚡ Opposite of photosynthesis.
🧪 C6H12O6 + 6O2 → 6CO2 + 6H2O + ATP
🏭 Happens in mitochondria.
🎮 Why do athletes breathe heavily after running?
🖼 [respiration.png]
